D:\AppGallery\Downloads\Qt\Tools\CMake_64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\wordlearner.dir/objects.a
D:\AppGallery\Downloads\Qt\Tools\mingw1310_64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\wordlearner.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\wordlearner.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\AppGallery\Downloads\Qt\Tools\mingw1310_64\bin\c++.exe -mwindows -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\wordlearner.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o wordlearner.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libwordlearner.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\wordlearner.dir\linkLibs.rsp
